title: Portfolio Decarbonization Analysis
description: Schema for the portfolio-analysis report type — portfolio-scale decarbonization analysis across all analysis-ready assets in a Soapbox portfolio (Audette physics + Soapbox DCF engine). CLIENT-RENDER template: the server injects this object into <script id="report-data"> and templates/portfolio-analysis/layout-agent.html renders every section and chart from it (fill_report path, same as RSRA/decarb). Base fields are the Phase-5 keys documented in skills/portfolio-analysis/SKILL.md. The signature Asset-Prioritization quadrant renders from the prioritization[] block, which is folded from the Audette "<client> Asset Prioritization Sheet.xlsx" (Prioritization / Values and Cap Rates / Cost and Savings Splits / Emissions Splits sheets). Every section hides gracefully when its data is absent. 2 significant figures; energy kWh / kWh·m⁻²; currency via fmtCurrency ($M/$K).

client_name.description: Client name. Renders the header title as '<client_name> Portfolio'.

portfolio_id.description: Soapbox portfolio ID or name (identification only; not displayed).

report_date.description: Report date string (e.g. '2026-06-18'). Renders in the meta strip.

prepared_by.description: Preparer label for the meta strip. Defaults to 'Aris (Soapbox AI)' if omitted.

fund_list.description: Optional human-readable fund list for the header subline. If omitted, derived from fund_summary[].fund.

org_goal.description: Optional organizational sustainability goal statement. When set with portfolio_kpis.org_goal_pct, a 5th KPI tile renders.

org_goal_label.description: Short label for the org-goal KPI tile (e.g. 'Net Zero 2040'). Defaults to 'Goal'.

parameters.description: Run configuration. Percent fields accept either a decimal fraction (0.15) or an already-percent number (15) — the template normalizes. Renders the footer parameters line and IRR-hurdle references throughout.

irr_hurdle.description: Minimum IRR for a measure to be recommended (e.g. 0.15 or 15).

utility_escalation.description: Annual escalation applied to energy savings (e.g. 0.03 or 3).

exit_year_floor.description: Assets exiting before this year are moved to the floor date.

value_method.description: 'inclusive' = NOI uplift capitalised at exit cap + added to terminal CF; 'standalone' = IRR on savings only.

target_years.description: Emissions scenario target years. Drives the trajectory summary-table columns. Defaults to [2030, 2035, 2040, 2050].

executive_summary.description: Executive summary block. Accepts a plain string (rendered as narrative) or an object with headline + narrative. Hidden if absent.

narrative.description: 3-4 sentence summary: portfolio scope, primary opportunity, headline CapEx and value creation.

portfolio_kpis.description: Headline KPI tiles (Phase 4A). Section hides if none of the four core fields are present.

total_capex_net.description: Total net-of-IRA CapEx across all recommended measures, USD. Tile 1.

total_capex_gross.description: Total gross CapEx, USD (optional; not tiled).

value_creation.description: Total value creation at exit cap, USD. Tile 2 (accent green).

emissions_reduction_tco2.description: Total emissions reduction potential, tCO2e. Tile 3.

assets_above_hurdle.description: Count of assets with at least one recommended measure above the IRR hurdle. Tile 4 numerator.

assets_total.description: Total analyzed assets. Tile 4 denominator; also feeds the header asset count.

compliance_exposure.description: Σ compliance cost if no action, USD (only meaningful with BPS).

pathway_aligned_2035.description: Count of assets pathway-aligned at 2035 after measures (only with CRREM).

org_goal_pct.description: Percent of org_goal achieved under the IRR pathway. With org_goal set, renders a 5th tile.

prioritization.description: SIGNATURE BLOCK — one object per asset, folded from the Audette '<client> Asset Prioritization Sheet.xlsx' Prioritization sheet (columns confirmed against the 2026-06-18 Greystar sheet). Drives the Asset-Prioritization quadrant: X = pct_reduction (emissions-reduction potential), Y = value_creation ($, from the DCF — the sheet's 'Value Creation Impact'), bubble radius ∝ reduction_potential_tco2e, color = above_hurdle (or derived from irr vs parameters.irr_hurdle), quadrant dividers at the medians of X and Y. Rows missing pct_reduction OR value_creation are silently omitted from the plot (real sheets carry #N/A rows, e.g. assets with no decarb model or already past exit). Section hides unless >= 2 plottable points exist.

asset.description: Property Name (sheet col 1). Labels the point.

rank.description: Optional explicit priority rank; the sheet orders rows by Modeled Emissions descending.

eui_kwh_m2.description: Site EUI. The sheet reports EUI (kWh/ft2, col 3); convert to kWh·m⁻² for reporting (× 10.7639) or store as provided and label the unit.

ghgi_kg_m2.description: GHG intensity. Sheet col 4 is GHGi (kg/ft2); convert to kg·m⁻² for reporting.

reduction_potential_tco2e.description: '2050 Reduction possible (tCO2e)' — sheet col 5. Drives the quadrant bubble SIZE (the sheet's GAV column is a corrupted date-serial; do not size by GAV).

pct_reduction.description: '2050 % Reduction possible' — sheet col 6. Quadrant X-AXIS. Accepts a fraction (0.30) or a percent (30).

residual_at_exit.description: 'Residual at Exit' — sheet col 7 (residual value/emissions at exit, USD or as modeled).

value_creation.description: 'Value Creation Impact' — sheet col 8, USD. Quadrant Y-AXIS. Comes from the DCF engine; may be negative (e.g. Union Tempe = -$2.1M).

irr.description: 'IRR on Incremental CapEx (w Asset Value)' — sheet col 9 (value-inclusive; matches parameters.value_method 'inclusive'). Used to derive above_hurdle when above_hurdle is absent. Accepts fraction or percent.

irr_ex_value.description: 'IRR on Incremental CapEX (w/o Asset Value)' — sheet col 10 (mostly blank in the source; standalone method).

gav.description: 'GAV' — sheet col 14, gross asset value USD. NOTE: in the 2026-06-18 Greystar sheet this column held corrupted Excel date-serials; validate before trusting, and never size the quadrant by it.

above_hurdle.description: Whether the asset's bundle meets the IRR hurdle. If omitted, the template derives it from irr vs parameters.irr_hurdle. Sets the point color (green = above, grey = below).

fund_summary.description: Fund-level rollup (Phase 4B). Section hides if empty. A 'Portfolio' totals row is appended when > 1 fund.

top_assets.description: Top-N assets by value creation (Phase 4C). Section hides if empty. Title auto-sizes to the array length. Rank defaults to array order.

measure_categories.description: Measure-category aggregate (Phase 4D). Renders a table with an inline CapEx bar per row and an 'All categories' totals row. Section hides if empty. $/tCO2 is computed as value_creation ÷ tco2_reduced.

emissions_trajectory.description: Portfolio emissions time series 2025-2050 (Phase 4E, only if include_crrem). Drives the 4-series line chart (absolute tCO2e/yr) + the target-year summary table. Section hides if < 2 rows. Confirmed against the sheet's Scenario Summary (BAU / Max Decarb / Target Decarb).

bau.description: Business-as-usual portfolio emissions, tCO2e/yr (grey dashed line).

crrem_trajectory.description: CRREM pathway summary (only if include_crrem). Section hides unless current_intensity or stranding_today_2030 is present. Intensity fields in kgCO2e·m⁻².

stranding_today_2030.description: Assets stranding before 2030 with no action.

stranding_measures_2030.description: Assets stranding before 2030 with recommended measures.

excluded_note.description: Note on assets excluded from the pathway (estimated EUI).

bps_assets.description: Building Performance Standards exposure (only if include_bps). Section hides if empty. A warning callout with the summed annual fine renders when the total > 0.

annual_fine.description: Projected annual fine if no action, USD.

fine_avoidance.description: Fine avoidance captured by measures, USD.

assets.description: Asset-by-asset detail (Phase 5). Section hides if empty. CRREM Status and BPS Exposure columns auto-appear only when at least one row carries crrem_status / bps_exposure. Flag a row with flagged:true to mark an open high-severity data-quality finding (⚠).

crrem_status.description: 'aligned' | 'at risk' | 'stranded' (badged) or free text. Only if include_crrem.

bps_exposure.description: Annual fine (number → currency) or free text. Only if include_bps.

below_hurdle.description: Below-hurdle measures reference table. Section hides if empty. IRR shown in red (neg) for transparency.

barrier.description: Why it misses (e.g. 'NNN tenant-metered — low LL capture').

deferred.description: Measures deferred due to retrofit lead-time vs hold period. Section hides if empty.

all_measures.description: Flat list of every measure across all assets (recommended + below-hurdle + deferred). Consumed by the XLSX companion (Phase 3E) for analyst verification; not rendered by this HTML template. Shape per SKILL.md Phase 3E.

asset_source_data.description: Raw per-asset inputs (Audette data + DCF parameters). Consumed by the XLSX companion (Phase 3E) for analyst verification; not rendered by this HTML template. Shape per SKILL.md Phase 3E.

data_quality.description: Data quality & verification (Phase 5). Section hides unless summary, items, or findings is present.

summary.description: Prose summary: Audette-verified vs. estimated EUI counts, verification pass/flag counts.

findings.description: Open high-severity verifier findings (from verifier__list_findings) — the material Audette-vs-doc conflicts. Renders a table.

values.description: Candidate values with sources, e.g. 'Audette 85 kWh·m⁻² · audit 62 kWh·m⁻²'.

working_value.description: Value chosen by the reconciliation hierarchy.

methodology.description: Methodology prose for the appendix. Section hides if this and sources are both absent.

sources.description: Citations for the collapsible sources block. URLs are validated (http/https only) and open in a new tab.
